channel.title: Automation on Dyson Sphere Program Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on Dyson Sphere Program Guide

item.title: Build a Mall in 30 Minutes - Never Hand-Craft a Building Again (DSP Guide)
item.description:
Hand-crafting buildings is the #1 time waste in DSP. You spend 20 minutes crafting assemblers, belts, and sorters when you should be designing production lines.

Here is how to build a mall - a factory that produces every building automatically, so you never craft by hand again. Before starting a mall, make sure your starter automation is producing gears, coils, and circuits reliably - a mall needs a steady supply of these components to function.

item.title: DSP Blueprint Guide (v0.10) - Copy and Paste Entire Factories in Seconds
item.description:
DSP v0.10 added a proper blueprint system. No more hand-placing every smelter. Here is everything you need to know about blueprints - from basic copy-paste to advanced mirroring and sharing.

TL;DR: How Blueprints Work in DSP v0.10

Press B to open the Blueprint Library. Select buildings (hold shift to multi-select), press CTRL+C to copy, then CTRL+V to paste. That is the basic flow. This guide covers the details that are not in the game.
